metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4963
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 1, S3: immunogold labeling of GPR151 and electron microscopy of the interpeduncular nucleus (IPN) of mouse brains showed synaptic localization of GPR151 mostly at the plasma membrane with a minor proportion of GPR151 observed at SVs and active zones.

Distribution in n=50 synaptic terminals from 3 WT mice that contained an active zone; 74% of particles at plasma membrane, 5% at AZ, 10% at SV, 1% at DCV (remaining particles were classified as 'other').

Fig. S2a,b: The majority of GPR151-expressing neurons (70%) are cholinergic neurons.

Based on the known transmembrane topology of this protein, "integral component of ... membrane" term was selected.. Experimental description: Supplemental Figure S3 shows the schematic of the brain area dissected for EM (referring to mouse brain used in Figure 1). "Representative micrographs of pre-embedding immunogold EM analyses showing
GPR151 immunogold particles at habenular terminals of WT mice indicating synaptic ..."

Supplemental M&M: "A combination of three different GPR151 antibodies (30
ug of rabbit polyclonal anti-GPR151 (Sigma, RRID:AB_10743863), 10 ug of goat
polyclonal anti-GPR151 (Santa Cruz, RRID:AB_2113821) and 20 ul of mouse polyclonal
anti-GPR151 (Sigma, RRID:AB_10608138) were coupled to 15 mg of beads per sample
during 24 hr at 37°C in 1.5 ml volume."
